hook: Responsibility in dating means owning your side of the tone, pace, and honesty.
body: Being responsible does not mean over-functioning for two people. It means making your part clean.

hook: Some men try to be impressive everywhere except where it matters most: consistency, communication, and respect.
body: Start by becoming easier to trust before trying to become unforgettable.

hook: Start by becoming easier to trust before trying to become unforgettable.
body: Following through, communicating clearly, and leaving when something is unhealthy builds more real confidence than chasing dramatic validation.
